system.description: When you **_spend time (an hour at least, maybe more) seeking to stir hope, kindness, or mercy in an NPC_**, roll +CHA: **on a 10+**, you light a fire deep within them and effect a lasting change; **_on a 7-9_**, you kindle goodness in their heart for now, but they will eventually return to their old ways; **on a 6-**, their heart hardens and, whatever else the GM says, you can't use this move on them again.

success.value: You light a fire deep within them and effect a lasting change.

partial.value: You kindle goodness in their heart for now, but they will eventually return to their old ways.

failure.value: Their heart hardens and you can't use this move on them again.
